# jvjohnson.dev resume resources

Primary resume page:
https://jvjohnson.dev/cv.html

Human-readable Markdown resume:
https://jvjohnson.dev/content/resume.md

AI and ATS scanner Markdown resume:
https://jvjohnson.dev/content/resume-ai-scanner.md

Homepage:
https://jvjohnson.dev/

Notes:
Jeffrey V. Johnson, Ph.D. is presented as an evaluations and agent-governance engineer. The public portfolio emphasizes agentic AI evaluation, agent governance, safeguards, policy-as-code, evidence-first audit, infrastructure, systems engineering, and applied statistics. Private governance-estate details are intentionally anonymized.
